{{Quote|There is always hope—particularly against an opponent who believes everything can be won by bullying.|[[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] Marcha|<ref name="Showdown at Centerpoint">''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''</ref>}}
'''Marcha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Drall/Legends|Drall]]. She had a prized garden of [[nannarium]]s. On her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] she was [[Duke/Legends|duchess]] of [[Mastigophorous]], and she was the aunt of [[Ebrihim]].

==Biography==
Marcha lived in a magnificent and sprawling [[Marcha's Estate|estate]] on Drall on the edge of a river and often held garden parties. Her gardens were known throughout the Drall community for their artistry.  Another point of pride for her was her [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]], which she bought from a vendor on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], even though this nearly caused a family scandal. She was level-headed by Drall standards, and her sharp voice and piercing eyes commanded respect. <ref>[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]</ref> She helped [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] escape from his cousin, [[Thrackan Sal-Solo|Thrackan]], during the [[Corellian Crisis]]. As a result, when [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] [[Micamberlecto]] was killed in the fighting, [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] appointed Marcha to be the new Governor-General of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

During the early years of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], she reluctantly allowed the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] to use [[Centerpoint Station]] as a weapon against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Her allowance led to the disastrous [[Battle of Fondor]]; following the battle, she was kicked out of office, the [[Centerpoint Party]] came to power, and Thrackan Sal-Solo reclaimed his position of power.
